name: M35 Cargo Truck (Deuce-and-a-Half)
prompt:
Vietnam War era M35 2.5-ton cargo truck "Deuce-and-a-Half". Primary supply/troop transport truck.

Physical structure:
- Cab: boxy enclosed cab with two doors
  - Windshield: two-piece flat glass with wipers
  - Roof: flat metal roof
  - Side windows
  - Grille: vertical slat grille at front
  - Round headlights: two at front, blackout capable
  - Bumper: heavy front bumper with tow hooks
- Cargo bed: long open bed behind cab (~3.5m long)
  - Wooden plank bed floor
  - Steel side rails and tailgate
  - Canvas cover: arched canvas top over bed supported by bows (ribs)
    - 4-5 arched metal bows creating tunnel shape
    - OD green canvas stretched over bows
  - Rear tailgate: can fold down (shown up)
- Wheels: 6 wheels total (2 front, 4 rear dual)
  - Front: 2 single wheels on front axle
  - Rear: 2 dual-wheel axles (tandem)
  - Large off-road tires, ~0.5m radius
- Exhaust: vertical stack on right side of cab

Colors: Olive drab (0x556B2F), canvas (0x6B6B4F), black tires (0x222222), dark frame (0x333333), windshield (0x88aaaa)
Orientation: Front toward +Z, wheels on ground at Y=0
Scale: Real-world meters (~6.7m long, ~2.4m wide, ~3.0m tall with canvas)
